steps.instruction: Focus and click on the input text field with placeholder 'Site içi arama' or name 'q'.
Type the text 'İletişim' into that active input search box.
Press the 'Enter' key on your keyboard to submit the search form.
Verify if the text 'Arama Sonuçları' appears anywhere in the visible page headers.
Look at the search results and click on the primary link for 'İletişim' or 'Birim İletişim Bilgileri'.
Scan the current page to verify if it contains a contact telephone number formatted like '+90 (274)' or general university phone details.
